## ✅ Verification

- [ ] `task check`
- [ ] `task build` when build, config or installer behavior changed
- [ ] Manual installer smoke test when install, update or uninstall behavior changed

## 📝 Notes

- [ ] Preserved UTF-8 encoding for NSIS files.
- [ ] Did not commit downloaded archives, cache folders, payload logs, `.env`, `.build`, `dist`, `node_modules`, or native `bin`/`obj` output.
- [ ] Updated documentation, release notes, changelog placeholders or workflow docs when needed.
- [ ] Commits are signed off for DCO.
